atlas_name: Allen Mouse Brain Atlas CCFv3 — Allen32
method: Direct Allen ontology membership with spatial hippocampal split
citation: Wang Q, Ding SL, Li Y, et al. (2020) Cell 181(4):936-953.e20

1.name: Prefrontal_mPFC_L
allen_structure_names: Anterior cingulate area, dorsal part, layer 2/3
Anterior cingulate area, ventral part, layer 2/3
Anterior cingulate area, ventral part, layer 1
Anterior cingulate area, ventral part, layer 5
Anterior cingulate area, dorsal part, layer 6a
Anterior cingulate area, dorsal part, layer 6b
Anterior cingulate area, dorsal part, layer 1
Anterior cingulate area, dorsal part, layer 5
1.description: Anterior cingulate (ACA), Prelimbic (PL), Infralimbic (ILA), Orbital (ORB), Frontal pole (FRP)

2.name: Motor_L
2.description: Primary motor area (MOp), Secondary motor area (MOs)

3.name: Somatosensory_L
allen_structure_names: Primary somatosensory area, lower limb, layer 2/3
Primary somatosensory area, barrel field, layer 2/3
Primary somatosensory area, upper limb, layer 1
Primary somatosensory area, lower limb, layer 6a
Primary somatosensory area, lower limb, layer 6b
Primary somatosensory area, upper limb, layer 4
Primary somatosensory area, upper limb, layer 5

Primary somatosensory area, upper limb, layer 6a

Primary somatosensory area, upper limb, layer 6b
Primary somatosensory area, lower limb, layer 1
Primary somatosensory area, barrel field, layer 6a
Primary somatosensory area, barrel field, layer 4
Primary somatosensory area, barrel field, layer 6b
Primary somatosensory area, barrel field, layer 5
Primary somatosensory area, lower limb, layer 4
Primary somatosensory area, lower limb, layer 5
3.description: Primary somatosensory area (SSp — all subfields: barrel field, upper limb, lower limb, trunk, mouth, nose), Supplemental somatosensory area (SSs)

4.name: Auditory_L
4.description: Auditory areas (AUD): primary, dorsal, ventral, posterior

5.name: Visual_Parietal_L
5.description: Visual areas (VIS: primary, lateral, anteromedial, posterolateral, etc.), Posterior parietal association areas (PTLp)

6.name: Retrosplenial_L
allen_structure_names: Retrosplenial area, lateral agranular part, layer 6b
Retrosplenial area, lateral agranular part, layer 1
Retrosplenial area, lateral agranular part, layer 5
Retrosplenial area, lateral agranular part, layer 6a
Retrosplenial area, lateral agranular part, layer 2/3
6.description: Retrosplenial area (RSP): dorsal (RSPd), ventral (RSPv), lateral agranular (RSPagl)

7.name: Hippocampus_Ant_L
7.description: Hippocampal formation — dorsal/anterior pole (septal, Y < median): CA1, CA2, CA3, dentate gyrus, subiculum, prosubiculum — spatial/memory function

8.name: Hippocampus_Post_L
8.description: Hippocampal formation — ventral/posterior pole (temporal, Y >= median): CA1, CA2, CA3, dentate gyrus, subiculum, entorhinal-adjacent — stress/emotion function

9.name: Thalamus_L
allen_structure_names: Intergeniculate leaflet of the lateral geniculate complex
Ventral part of the lateral geniculate complex
Lateral posterior nucleus of the thalamus
Central lateral nucleus of the thalamus
Central medial nucleus of the thalamus

Ventral medial nucleus of the thalamus

Dorsal part of the lateral geniculate complex, ipsilateral zone
9.description: All thalamic nuclei: reticular, ventral medial, ventral lateral, mediodorsal, posterior, lateral geniculate, medial geniculate, etc.

10.name: Striatum_L
allen_structure_names: Bed nucleus of the anterior commissure
Bed nucleus of the accessory olfactory tract
Bed nuclei of the stria terminalis
10.description: Cerebral nuclei: Caudoputamen (CP), Nucleus accumbens (ACB), Olfactory tubercle (OT), Pallidum (PAL)

11.name: Hypothalamus_L
allen_structure_names: Vascular organ of the lamina terminalis
11.description: All hypothalamic regions: lateral, medial, periventricular zones, mammillary nuclei — ventral-most structure

12.name: Amygdala_L
allen_structure_names: Cortical amygdalar area, posterior part, lateral zone
Cortical amygdalar area, posterior part, medial zone
12.description: Basolateral amygdalar nucleus (BLA), Central amygdalar nucleus (CEA), Cortical amygdalar area (COA), Claustrum (CLA), Endopiriform nucleus (EP)

13.name: Olfactory_Bulb_L
13.description: Main olfactory bulb (MOB), Accessory olfactory bulb (AOB)

14.description: Agranular insular (AI: dorsal, posterior, ventral), Piriform area (PIR), Entorhinal area (ENT), Temporal association areas (TEa), Ectorhinal area (ECT), Perirhinal area (PERI), Postpiriform transition area, Retrohippocampal area (RHP) — all lateral/ventrolateral cortical regions

15.name: Cerebellum_L
15.description: Cerebellar cortex (all lobules: I-X, Crus 1/2, paraflocculus, flocculus) and cerebellar nuclei (fastigial, interposed, dentate)
